memoryArtifacts.headline: Wiki Bio Stubb
memoryArtifacts.description:
Margaret, Countess of Lennox was the daughter of Domhnall, Earl of Lennox, who died in about 1364.[1] She married Walter de Fasselane, a cousin, who also descended from previous Earls of Lennox.[1]

M …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret MacArkill於大約1320年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾巴洛 卡素時，她的父親Domhnall of Lennox - Earl of Lennox31歲，母親Lady Margaret31歲。她和Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox至少有3個兒子。她去世於大約1388年8月19日在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾巴洛 卡素享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: MacArkill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCaskill
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Asgaill ‘son of Asgall’, a shortened Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Ásketill, composed of the elements óss, áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret MacArkill was born about 1320, in Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, her father, Domhnall of Lennox - Earl of Lennox, was 31 and her mother, Lady Margaret, was 31. She had at least 3 sons with Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox. She died about 19 August 1388, in Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret MacArkill est née environ 1320, à Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Domhnall of Lennox - Earl of Lennox, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox. Elle est décédée environ 19 août 1388, à Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret MacArkill(이)가 대략 1320년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 바럭 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Domhnall of Lennox - Earl of Lennox(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1388년 8월 19일 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 바럭 카스틀에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret MacArkill родилась около 1320 г. в местности баллоч кастл, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Domhnall of Lennox - Earl of Lennox было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Walter of Faslane Earl of Lennox. Она умерла около 19 августа 1388 г. в местности баллоч кастл, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
